form.formComment: Comes here second-up after two weeks. Lacklustre first-up performance when was driven from back in the field when 5th (Fr6) over 1609m after racing wide at Cranbourne was 6th-10.1 at the bell, beaten 18 m by Bond Girl (1:58.70) in NR up to 39 on April 3 at $81. This may be too tough.

form.formComment: Last start 7th (Fr4) over 2150m at Bendigo was 7th-8.77 at the bell, beaten 6 m by Miss Piggy Wiggy (2:39.40) in NR up to 45 on April 8 at $9. Before that, a solid effort despite getting well back, when 3rd (Fr2) over 2240m at Swan Hill, at the bell was 2nd-2.7 beaten 6 m by Outback Queenie (2:48.90) in NR 38 to 44 on March 31 at $7.50. Draws for a strong showing.

Draws for a strong showing.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Over raced in the early and middle stages of the race.

form.formComment: Last start 11th (Sr5) over 2200m after racing wide at Ballarat, beaten 35 m by Skyz Above (2:43.60) in NR up to 42 on March 19 at $34. Two runs back 4th (Fr4) over 1755m at Echuca was 4th-7.8 at the bell, beaten 2.5 m by The Ladybird (2:10.10) in NR 37 to 42 on March 10 at $5.50. Not keen on his chances in this field.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide through the first 600m to then race outside the leader.
Weakened inside the final 650m to be beaten 71.7m.
Led and gave ground over the latter stages beaten 34.8m.

form.formComment: Eight-year-old gelding showed improvement last start. 3rd (Fr5) over 1710m after showing early pace at Ballarat, at the bell was leading 1.78 beaten 4.5 m by Sir Candy Cloud (2:04.60) in NR up to 37 on April 9 at $11. The race before was not as impressive when well beaten into sixth behind Shiralee at this track over 2180m in a NR 36 to 40 on April 2 at $34. Prefer others.

The race before was not as impressive when well beaten into sixth behind Shiralee at this track over 2180m in a NR 36 to 40 on April 2 at $34. Prefer others.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Pulled hard while racing outside the leader during the middle stages.
Checked and broke shortly after the start.

form.formComment: Solid performance when beaten by 2 m finishing second after a quick start, behind Inexorable at Cranbourne over 2080m in a NR 40 to 46 on March 29 at $6.50. Then a handy effort when beaten by 3 m finishing third behind Lazenby at Cranbourne over 1609m in a NR 40 to 45 on April 3 at $2.50. Leading contender.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Pull up blocks failed to activate in the home straight.
Raced roughly in the run to the finish.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a solid effort despite getting well back, when 3rd (Fr7) over 1690m at this track, at the bell was 6th-8.77 beaten 4 m by Janiebquick (2:03.30) in NR 45 to 48 on April 2 at $41. Heading the right way and is a player.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up, tightened and locked wheels near the 300m.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Fr3) over 2160m after being wide early at Echuca beaten 25 m by Mussel Shoals (2:40.00) in NR 45 to 50 on April 5 at $81. Two runs back won by a head when driven back in the field, (Fr6) held up early, at this track (2:44.90) beating Theroux in NR up to 40 on March 12 at $9 at the bell was 4th-6.87. Not keen.

form.formComment: Last start 7th (Fr5) over 2190m after racing wide at Shepparton, beaten 45 m by Blackjack Whacko (2:43.70) in NR up to 51 on March 3 at $6.50. Before that, 9th (Sr3) over 1690m at Shepparton, beaten 50 m by Eastbro Jesse (2:00.60) in NR 43 to 48 on February 24 at $2.20. Better than the last couple of runs suggest.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into sixth behind Midnight Mojo at Melton over 2240m in a NR up to 49 on March 20 at $8. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third after a quick start, behind Backbeach Peter at Terang over 2180m in a NR up to 50 on March 27 at $9. Fitter again and has the ability to take this out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung in through middle and late stages.

form.formComment: Won three starts back at this track over 2180m NR 46 to 49 on March 26. Last start was driven from back in the field when 8th (Fr3) over 2190m at Maryborough beaten 22 m by Good Day (2:42.00) in NR 50 to 55 on April 10 at $71. Can do much better.
